summary: Testing iteration 4 complete. New UI improvements tested: Navbar dropdown hover (Services & Resources), Footer redesign (newsletter form, Company/Resources columns, social links, contact info), About page (hero, story with image, stats, mission/vision, values, timeline, team, CTA), Blog page (featured post, search, category filters, detail page with tags/share/author bio), FAQ page (search, category tabs, accordions, contact CTA), Portfolio page (filter, masonry grid, modal), CalendlyEmbed and GoogleMap configurable components, and tablet responsiveness. All 110 frontend tests pass including 63 new tests. All 10 backend API tests pass.

issues: Calendly iframe shows 404 'Page not found' - this is a Calendly configuration issue, not app code

action_items: Configure valid Calendly URL in calendlyConfig (currently shows 404 in iframe)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements fully tested. New spec files: footer-navbar.spec.ts (15 tests for navbar dropdown and footer), page-improvements.spec.ts (36 tests for About/Blog/FAQ/Portfolio pages), embedded-components.spec.ts (12 tests for CalendlyEmbed/GoogleMap and tablet responsiveness). Existing specs updated to match new footer design (Company/Resources columns instead of QUICK LINKS/CONTACT US). Blog slugs use format like 'digital-transformation-2025'. Portfolio project IDs: 1=Consulting, 2=Web Development. Newsletter popup suppressed via localStorage('newsletterPopupDismissed', 'true') in tests.
